scenario: DPA carves out EU subprocessor EuroDataPro GmbH from SCC obligations. GDPR Art. 28 + SCC conflict.
adversarial_notes: Carve-out smuggled into DPA Exhibit B.

documents.soc2:
SOC 2 Type II Report — EuroLogix Cloud
Audit period: 2024-01 to 2024-12
Trust Services Criteria: Security, Availability, Confidentiality
Opinion: Unqualified. No exceptions noted.
Auditor: Independent CPA firm.
documents.iso27001:
ISO/IEC 27001 Certificate — EuroLogix Cloud
Valid through: 2027-06-01
Scope: Information security management for production services.
documents.dpa:
Data Processing Agreement — EuroLogix Cloud
Governing SCC module: 2021 (Module 2: Controller → Processor)
Subject matter: provision of contracted services.
Subprocessor approval: prior written approval required (Art. 28(2)).
EXHIBIT B — Subprocessor carve-out: Notwithstanding Section 4, the subprocessor EuroDataPro GmbH is excluded from SCC obligations and shall be governed by separate terms.
documents.subprocessor_list:
Subprocessor list:
  - AWS Inc.
  - EuroDataPro GmbH
documents.questionnaire:
Security Questionnaire (SIG Lite) — EuroLogix Cloud
Encryption: Encryption in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256).
MFA: Required for all customer-facing access.
Breach notification: 72 hours.
documents.package_summary: Vendor package summary: Vendor with DPA carve-out for EU subprocessor.
